flows.redaction: redact before logs, traces, exports, and support bundles
flows.retention: local retention policy required before release evidence
flows.export_delete: subject export and delete linkage required
flows.third_party_transfer: cloud transfer requires explicit disclosure and opt-in

flows.redaction: redact provider errors and private content before logs or exports
flows.retention: local retention policy required before release evidence
flows.export_delete: derived outputs remain linked to project export and delete requests

flows.redaction: secret, path, malware, and PII scans required before sharing
flows.retention: project retention and attachment expiry required
flows.export_delete: project export and delete must include attachment derivatives

flows.access_scope: project owner or authenticated local operator
flows.redaction: redact secrets, paths, provider URLs, and untrusted text
flows.retention: export retention and revocation policy required
flows.third_party_transfer: publication requires explicit public-export boundary proof

flows.redaction: content, summary, provenance, and embedding references require redaction before export
flows.retention: memory expiry and vector deletion required
flows.export_delete: delete vector rows and derived indexes

flows.access_scope: training owner after consent and review proof
flows.redaction: PII and secret filtering before persistence or training
flows.retention: training record retention and replay buffer expiry required
flows.export_delete: subject delete must remove training traces and derived rows
flows.third_party_transfer: external training services require explicit consent

flows.redaction: redact feedback content before durable authority promotion
flows.retention: rule activation status, expiry, and rollback required
flows.export_delete: delete linkage required for source feedback

flows.redaction: raw local paths and usernames must be redacted
flows.retention: adapter inventory retention and cache provenance required
flows.export_delete: delete adapter metadata and generated cache rows
flows.third_party_transfer: model/provider metadata transfer requires terms review

flows.redaction: redact before export to logs, traces, and support bundles
flows.export_delete: delete linked trace artifacts for subject/project requests
flows.third_party_transfer: telemetry endpoint allowlist and disclosure required

flows.redaction: secret redaction and payload minimization required
flows.retention: notification payload retention must be documented
flows.export_delete: delete/export hooks required for retained payloads
flows.third_party_transfer: Slack, Discord, Jira, and generic URLs require disclosure

flows.redaction: provider errors and private fields redacted before logs
flows.retention: provider retention terms must be recorded
flows.third_party_transfer: provider terms and no-training settings required where available

flows.access_scope: project-scoped ingestion after host and path checks
flows.redaction: query and result redaction before durable storage/export
flows.retention: provenance retention and cache expiry required
flows.export_delete: delete cached content and derived indexes

flows.access_scope: bounded tool caller with env allowlist
flows.redaction: secret stripping required before command output persistence
flows.retention: bounded output and command provenance retention required
flows.export_delete: delete tool receipts and derived diagnostic records

flows.redaction: trust tier, privacy class, redaction, and review proof required
flows.retention: expiry, activation, rollback, and retention policy required
flows.export_delete: deletion linkage required for source session data

flows.access_scope: release operator after secret and path scans
flows.redaction: secret, path, and prompt scan required before upload or publication
flows.retention: artifact upload and retention policy required
flows.export_delete: release artifact provenance and deletion linkage required

flows.redaction: local paths redacted; license, gated, private, and revision metadata preserved
flows.retention: model cache and health record retention required
flows.export_delete: model cache provenance rows must be deletable
flows.third_party_transfer: provider or model registry requests require terms review
